stories.title: NBA playoff takeaways: Spurs blow out Wolves by 38...
stories.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the second round.

stories.title: Spurs rebound, hand Wolves largest playoff defeat
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 19 points and 15 rebounds, and the Spurs handed Minnesota the worst postseason loss in franchise history, beating the Timberwolves 133-95 on Wednesday night to even their Western Conference semifinal series at one game apiece.

stories.title: Brunson, Knicks pull out win, go up 2-0 on 76ers
stories.summary: Jalen Brunson scored 26 points and helped New York seize control of a close game, leading the Knicks to a victory Wednesday night.

stories.title: Pats' Maye backs Vrabel: 'Great human being'
stories.summary: Patriots quarterback Drake Maye stood behind his coach and said he doesn't believe Mike Vrabel's off-field issues will be a distraction this season.

stories.title: Brown: If up to me, I'd be in Boston long term
stories.summary: Jaylen Brown reaffirmed his happiness in Boston on Wednesday night, saying if it was up to him, he'd remain with the Celtics for the next 10 years.
